title: PID Alternative Names and PRINCE2 Relationship
summary: Explains the different names for a Project Initiation Document—Project Charter, Project Brief—and describes how the PID concept derives from PRINCE2’s initiation stage.
content: The Project Initiation Document (PID) is also referred to as a Project Charter or Project Brief across many project management methodologies. While the terminology varies, the purpose remains the same: to formally launch a project with a defined scope, governance structure, and success criteria. The PID concept originates from the PRINCE2 methodology, which mandates a dedicated project initiation stage. Most frameworks include an equivalent artifact to capture early‑stage project information.
can_answer: What other names are used for a PID?
How does PRINCE2 define or relate to a PID?
